title: Vintage - Programmer Art Remade
description: A new, yet familiar look for Minecraft.
body:
![The Vintage logo with the artwork as the background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69a79ada89d9d957cccd1b57db6705e5788236aa_0.webp)

A pack that redesigns the game with a look inspired/based on classic textures, concept art, and cut features.

**This pack is best used with** [**Optifine**](https://optifine.net/home) **or Fabric** [**ETF**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) **and** [**EMF**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)﻿ **mods!**

If you found any issues, please comment on the [PlanetMinecraft Page!](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/vanilla-mix-w-i-p-preview)
#

<summary>Terms of Use</summary>

If you wish to use a feature from Vintage in your own products, reach for permission and give credit.

## You are allowed to
- Promote or include the pack in videos, servers, etc. and link back to it.
- Use or modify one or more textures after receiving permission.

You are restricted from
- 
- Redistributing the pack unofficially.
- Putting any feature under a paywall.
- Referring to it as your own work.

</details>
